notes: As per ICS2 rules: If you would like us to file a full ENS (i.e. incl. house level and/or buyer/seller data), please provide us with the relevant data in your shipping instructions within doc / SI cut off, otherwise please submit the EORI of the next filing party (self-filer / supplementary declarant).

Please note that EU customs authorities will require complete ENS data from 1 September 2025. If you do not provide us with your partial ENS data, you will need to make other arrangements to submit the data to the customs authorities. Without complete ENS data, customs authorities at EU ports may not release the cargo.
This booking confirmation is subject to receiving of all relevant bill of lading / sea waybill data from the shipper in due time respectively according to local documentation closing dates/times.

*** FIO Charges remark *** We would once again inform you weight deviation charge is applicable to export shipments, pls refer below link for more details https://www.hapag-lloyd.com/en/services-information/news/2021/08/here-s-an-update-for-weight-deviation-fee--fio--for-india-export.html

LOCAL INFO INDIA SUBCONTINENT INDIA LOCAL DOCUMENTS BOOKING CONFIRMATION RE MARKS. ENSURE TO CHECK THE CNTR/S AVAILABILITY BEFORE SENDING TRAILER. legal_terms: All dates/times are best reasonable estimates and may change.
The booking confirmation is subject to sealing of container with high security seals by shipper.
Container stowage on vessel is in Carrier's discretion.

Carrier operates under its Bill of Lading/Sea Waybill terms and conditions which are incorporated herein by reference with the same force and effect as though fully set forth herein and which will be provided upon request or displayed in any of Carrier's/its agent's offices or under www.hapag-lloyd.com, containing liability limitations deviating from German law.
